author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Never Alone Mission 3 is LIVE

The journey to uncovering Saand's lost memories continues with Mission 3 of Never Alone - The Dreamer.  

In Mission 3 our heroes have joined the crew of Captain Amara in order to gain access to the Elusive planet Etira, where clues to Saand's past seem to be hidden.

Complete quests, gain XP, and use that XP to gain Star Atlas loot. New Mission 3 loot includes:
 Exclusive Prayer to Iris Emote
 Fimbul Airbike
 Puri Pet

Note: With Mission 2 now officially ending, Mission 1 and 2 memories will be distributed soon. Stay tuned for updates!

 | Start Mission 3 Now: https://zealy.io/c/staratlas-never-alone/questboard
